creator: paul@amy.home.net
text:
make readmes in the ports system fails making final README.

===>  Creating README.html
===> x11-wm
===>  Creating README.html
===>   Creating README.html for all ports
/usr/ports/Tools/make_readmes: Permission denied
*** Error code 126

Stop in /usr/ports.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports ; make readmes
